---
title: "Science"
subtitle: "Notes on papers, methods, and ideas in neuroscience."
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  contents: "*"
  type: default
  image-align: right
  image-height: "180px"
  sort: "date desc"
  fields: [date, title, categories, description, image]
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  feed: true
  date-format: "MMM D, YYYY"
toc: false
---
